about_the_product.title: Thermaltake Smart BM3 Bronze 650W - TT Premium Edition
about_the_product.description: This 80+ Bronze-certified unit delivers dependable efficiency for value-minded builders while supporting the latest hardware with a PCIe Gen5 12VHPWR connector. Semi-modular cables reduce clutter for cleaner builds, and a 120mm Fluid Dynamic Bearing fan keeps temperatures and noise in check. With 650W of stable, clean power, dual EPS12V connectors, and generous PCIe, SATA, and peripheral options, it’s ready for high-end GPUs and CPUs. Includes power cord; black finish matches most builds.

features.title: Protection Features
features.value: Undervoltage protection, Overcurrent protection, Overheat protection, Overvoltage protection

features.title: Highlighted Features
features.value: Smart Zero Fan, Active Power Factor Correction (PFC), Fluid dynamic bearing cooling fan

items.title: Thermaltake Unveils Smart BM3 ATX 3.0 Bronze Series PSU

items.snippet: supply is a very good value for the money. It is a reliable supply for general use. If there is a large GPU, you may want to step up to the next power level.
Literally stopped working 40 days after buying it. I would not recommend it
Solid power supply, convenient cables management!!

pros: Up to 88 per cent efficiency at 50 per cent load
items.title: Thermaltake unveils Smart BM3 Bronze semi-modular PSU with 12VHPWR connector

items.snippet: Easy to install and use. Has no problem providing up to 400W to my setup.
Perfect replacement power supply. Was easy to install and quick to get my hands on.
So far so good, used for my dad’s PC and runs super quiet and looks clean
Over all I love the build quality of this psu. I love the fact it’s a semi modular and if needed it also comes with the connector for the 40 series rtx cards

user_reviews.title: Works well - but not on dual cpu Motherboard
user_reviews.text:
Pro - I like that this and other psu's come with a PCIe Gen 5.1 (12V-2x6) connector for modern graphics cards. It saves using 2-3 GPU power cables connecting to an adapter.

Con - I bought this card for a dual CPU board. However Thermaltake in their efforts to save costs on a second cpu cable - combined both cpu power connectors into 1 cable. However the distance between the 2 connectors is not long enough to connect to both cpu power connectors.

I know this is not a common problem but just be aware.

user_reviews.title: Best PSU
user_reviews.text: I couldn’t be happier with this purchase. The build quality is excellent and you can immediately tell it’s made with premium components. Installation was quick and straightforward, and it has performed flawlessly since day one. Everything runs smoothly, quietly, and efficiently with zero issues. It delivers exactly what it promises and gives great peace of mind knowing my system is powered by something this reliable. For the price, the value is incredible — I would absolutely recommend this to anyone looking for top-tier performance and durability. Definitely a 5-star product!

user_reviews.title: Works great!
user_reviews.text: Very good PSU, I've had it for a while now and it's still running flawlessly. I've had zero issues with it on my RTX 5060 Ti setup. I have a relatively small PC case, but the cable management — although messy in my setup — wasn't all too difficult and it fits nicely in my case.

user_reviews.title: Could’ve burned down my house.
user_reviews.text: didn’t even own it for 30 days.. NOT EVEN 30 DAYS. today was the 28th day I owned this product and the power cord got so hot it burnt straight through and started sparking nearly electrocuting me. There’s a burn mark on my carpet, and if I wasn’t there when it happened it could’ve easily burned my house down. Do not buy this product.

user_reviews.title: 750 psu
user_reviews.text: Over all I love the build quality of this psu. I love the fact it’s a semi modular and if needed it also comes with the connector for the 40 series rtx cards. Currently I have this powering a Ryzen 5 5600x with a rtx 3060 12gb card and it performs pretty well. I would recommend this in ur next build or event your first build super simple to work with

user_reviews.title: Happy Gamer Now
user_reviews.text: Came with a lot of extra items, I thought it was going to be like an ikea build, but wasn’t and had it installed and running in less than 20 minutes. It was available that day and well within my budget. Has performed flawlessly since installed, which was a couple months ago.

user_reviews.title: Look no further. Great PSU with Upgradeability.
user_reviews.text: One of the best bang for your buck power supplies on the market. Easy to install with all the attachments for a 4 pcie 6+2pin gpu. Never had an issue and use in all my 700- watt builds., supper quiet and looks great.
